title: Hire French-speaking and bilingual candidates - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire French-speaking and bilingual candidates
- Participate in the Destination Canada Mobility Forum Recruit pre-screened, French-speaking and bilingual workers from a global pool of candidates.
Participate in the Destination Canada Mobility Forum
Recruit pre-screened, French-speaking and bilingual workers from a global pool of candidates.
- Hire temporary workers through Francophone Mobility Simplify the hiring process for temporary workers eligible under this program.
Hire temporary workers through Francophone Mobility
Simplify the hiring process for temporary workers eligible under this program.
- Discover the benefits of the Express Entry system Recruit qualified French-speaking and bilingual workers in the Express Entry system.
Discover the benefits of the Express Entry system
Recruit qualified French-speaking and bilingual workers in the Express Entry system.
- Take advantage of the Francophone Community Immigration Pilot (FCIP) If you’re an employer in a participating community, you can hire qualified candidates for jobs you haven’t been able to fill locally.
Take advantage of the Francophone Community Immigration Pilot (FCIP)
If you’re an employer in a participating community, you can hire qualified candidates for jobs you haven’t been able to fill locally.
- Hire a French-speaking or bilingual worker in Atlantic Canada Learn how the Atlantic Immigration Program can help you recruit workers and international graduate students.
Hire a French-speaking or bilingual worker in Atlantic Canada
Learn how the Atlantic Immigration Program can help you recruit workers and international graduate students.
- Boost your recruitment of Francophone and bilingual foreign workers Discover fact sheets with information on countries that are sources of French-speaking and bilingual labour abroad.
Boost your recruitment of Francophone and bilingual foreign workers
Discover fact sheets with information on countries that are sources of French-speaking and bilingual labour abroad.
- Hire a French-speaking worker in New Brunswick Find out how the New Brunswick Strategic Initiative stream can help you recruit skilled French-speaking workers.
Hire a French-speaking worker in New Brunswick
Find out how the New Brunswick Strategic Initiative stream can help you recruit skilled French-speaking workers.
- Hire a bilingual worker in Ontario Find out how the French-Speaking Skilled Worker stream can help you recruit skilled bilingual workers.
Hire a bilingual worker in Ontario
Find out how the French-Speaking Skilled Worker stream can help you recruit skilled bilingual workers.
- Newcomer services Get free services to help your new employee settle and integrate into their new community.
Get free services to help your new employee settle and integrate into their new community.
- Watch these videos on Francophone immigration to Canada
Watch these videos on Francophone immigration to Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
